text:
Author: lwhsu
Date: Thu Aug 29 07:22:17 2013
New Revision: 325567
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325567

Log:
  - Install unzipped egg
  - Include py3k-fix-pkg-plist for ${PYTHON_REL} >= 320
  
  PR:		ports/181216
  Submitted by:	olivierd

Added:
  head/devel/py-pytz/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/py-pytz/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/py-pytz/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-pytz/Makefile	Thu Aug 29 06:26:33 2013	(r325566)
+++ head/devel/py-pytz/Makefile	Thu Aug 29 07:22:17 2013	(r325567)
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	pytz
 PORTVERSION=	2013b
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -14,6 +15,13 @@ USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|=True|=False|' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
+
+.if ${PYTHON_REL} >= 320
+.include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-virtualenv/files/py3k-fix-pkg-plist.inc"
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/devel/py-pytz/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
